meaning: n.南非的公用荷兰语adj.(使用)南非荷兰语的,南非白人的
examples: Pronounced FREAR-duh, the town of about 2, 500 takes its name from the Afrikaans word for "peace."
Of course, as we all know, Creolisation will mean the victory of English and the defeat of Afrikaans.
They must complete the job of obliterating Afrikaans and the Afrikaner people from the map of South Africa.
Their rejection of bilingualism underlined their aim to make Afrikaans and Afrikaners paramount in South Africa.
He took refuge in London after exposing the group in an interview with a liberal Afrikaans newspaper.
